value.found_quote: An isolation mode that runs Claude in a separate git worktree under `.claude/worktrees/`, enabled with the `-w` flag or `isolation: worktree` in subagent config. Changes stay on a separate branch in a separate directory, so parallel agents don't overwrite each other's files.
value.rationale: The page's "Worktree isolation" glossary entry describes an isolation mode (configured via `isolation: worktree` in subagent config) that gives agents a separate git worktree—an isolated copy of the repository—so parallel agents don't overwrite each other's files. This substantiates the claim.
